svg.title: Enclosure Front Panel - Orthographic Drawing
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the enclosure front panel. Scale: 1.35 px/mm (front view, top view), 8 px/mm (side detail view). Coordinate system: X=width (0-220mm), Y=depth (0-4mm), Z=height (0-400mm). Origin at exterior front-bottom-left. Front view (looking along -Y): X horizontal, Z vertical. Side view (looking along -X): Y horizontal, Z vertical. Top view (looking along -Z): X horizontal, Y vertical.
svg.text: Material: ABS or ASA (3D printed) | Envelope: 220W x 4D x 400H mm | Scale noted per view

g.text: Section through slot top edge | Scale 5:1
1. Material: ABS or ASA, 3D printed. Match main body color/material.
2. Cartridge slot: 148W x 84H mm (inner), centered in panel width (36mm margins).
3. Chamfered entrance: 5mm x 45-deg chamfer on top and side slot edges.
Outer lip: 158W x 94H mm (exterior face). Narrows to 148 x 84 at interior face.
Panel is 4mm thick; chamfer spans full panel depth.
4. Display dock recesses: 2x 50mm dia x 5mm deep (through at 4mm thickness).
Centers: (X=55, Z=275) and (X=157, Z=275). Accept magnetic display pucks.
5. Cable exit holes: 2x 8mm dia, centered in each dock recess. For flat Cat6.
6. Status LED window: position TBD, near cartridge slot.
7. Panel attaches to main body front edge. Slot edges align with floor rails.
8. Slot bottom at Z=0 (panel bottom edge).
- Cartridge (148W x 130D x 80H mm) enters slot, rests on enclosure floor.
- 5mm chamfer accepts 10-15mm initial misalignment for blind insertion.
- Three-stage alignment: chamfer capture, floor/side rails, tapered pins.
- Floor rails: 2mm tall, 3mm wide, guide cartridge 130mm into dock.
- Side guides: 1.5mm wide rails, 0.3-0.5mm clearance per side.
- JG push-to-connect fittings grip dock stubs automatically on full insertion.
- Cam lever locks cartridge; flip to release all 4 JG connections at once.
